subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-06-15
subcodes.first_line: What I have spoken is according to the capacity of the people and the exigency of the time. 'The father makes gurgling sounds for the newborn infant, although his wisdom can measure the universe.'
subcodes.first_line_orig: بر حسب استعداد نفوس و اقتضای  وقت است بهرطفلک آن پدر تی تی کند گر چه عقلش هندسهٴ گیتی کند
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism
